author: Aaij, Roel and others
title: Angular Analysis of the  $B^{+}\rightarrow K^{\ast+}\mu^{+}\mu^{-}$ Decay
abstract: an angular analysis of the $B^+ \to K^{\ast+}(\to K^0_S \pi^+) \mu^+ \mu^−$ decay using $9 {\rm fb}^{−1}$ of $pp$ collision data, with the full set of CP-averaged angular observables in intervals of the dimuon invariant mass squared
